Thu, Mar 13, 2025 · 5:00 PM to 8:00 PM EET

Vinted Vilnius HQ

Švitrigailos 13 · Vilnius

Vilnius dbt Meetup #2
D

Hosted by dbt L.

Super Organizer

Baltic dbt Meetup
4.5
11 reviews
Details

Join us for the 2nd meetup focused on real-world data analytics, where industry leaders share hands-on experiences, challenges, and key insights. Powered by dbt Labs & TeraSky, this event is tailored for professionals seeking practical knowledge, actionable strategies, and meaningful discussions with peers in the field.

Expect insightful case studies from TeraSky, Vinted, and Kilo Health, offering real solutions to data challenges. Plus, connect with fellow experts, exchange ideas, and expand your network in a focused, high-value setting.

When & where?
The meetup will take place in the Vinted HQ, located in Švitrigailos str. 13, Vilnius.

📅 Date: 13th of March, 2025
👋 Doors open: 17:00
🕑 Duration: ~3 hours

Agenda

17:00-17:30 – Welcome snacks & drinks
17:30-18:00 – From Development to Production: Mastering dbt CI/CD with Argo Workflows, Gediminas Krištopaitis, Data Team Lead @TeraSky
18:00-18:30 – Getting to dbt: data ingestion at Vinted, Saulius Valatka, Staff Engineer @Vinted
18:30-19:00 – Orchestrating dbt with Airflow Datasets, Valerija Životkevič, Data Engineer @Kilo Health
From 19:00 – Networking

Registration is mandatory and spots are limited – secure your place now:
**https://www.eventbrite.com/e/vilnius-dbt-meetup-2-tickets-1245851779209**

See you soon! 👋

About dbt meetups
dbt Meetups are data community events open to all folks working with data. Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, but you can expect presentations on broader topics like analytics engineering, data stacks, data operations, modeling, testing, and team structures.

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

About the organizers
TeraSky is a team of cloud, cybersecurity, and data engineering experts ready to help with your toughest technical challenges. Also, they’re the only official dbt partner in the Baltics. More at **terasky-europe.com**

🤝For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-baltics channel in dbt Community Slack (getdbt.com/community).
----------------------------------
dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 40,000 organizations worldwide. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust. Learn more: getdbt.com

events.raw_text:

This event has passed

Community AMA with Erica Louie (dbt Labs)
Network event

99 attendees from 54 groups hosting

D

Hosted by dbt L.

Super Organizer

Baltic dbt Meetup
4.5
11 reviews
Details

REGISTER HERE 👉 https://www.getdbt.com/resources/webinars/community-slack-ama

🚀 Hey Community! Are you ready to dive deep, get insights, and satisfy your curiosity?

We’re hosting monthly live Ask Me Anything events! It's the perfect platform to quench your curiosity and get to know each other better. Don't miss out on this opportunity to connect and learn together.

What to Expect:

Discussing trends in the analytics space
Sharing key takeaways from the recent events
Hearing your questions and thoughts

Speaker: Erica Louie, Data @ dbt Labs
Host: Bolaji Oyejide, Digital Community Mgr @ dbt Labs
Topic: Careers in data, building a data team, the dbt Semantic Layer, and scaling your dbt project
When: November 21st @ 2pm EST
Where: Virtual and in #dbt-community-merge

Erica was the second employee at dbt Labs, then called Fishtown Analytics and she's seen dbt grow, a lot. In this AMA, Erica will share more on her career in data, her strong opinions on building a data team, how she manages her team, the dbt Semantic Layer, scaling your dbt project, and more on her Substack.

Register now to get the link to watch and join the #dbt-community-ama channel in Slack to participate live!

Read more
Speaker
Erica Louie, dbt Labs

Second hire at dbt Labs, former Head of Data, and now leading the product data team (and previously worked for BuzzFeed's data team), Erica "ric" Louie proudly hails from a liberal arts background (studied political science + italian) and grew her career in data at dbt Labs starting from the ground-up. She firmly believes that anyone can be a data practitioner with the right mentors, resources (sans trivial data jargon), and a good sense of humor. While rethinking the philosophy behind data systems, operations, and teams is one of her favorite topics, she enjoys thinking and writing about the human experience, and how it intersects with the work we choose to do and who we choose to do it with.

D

Super Organizer

Baltic dbt Meetup
4.5

Details

Get ready for the first ever Baltic dbt Meetup! 🇱🇹

Data engineering pros from Oxylabs, Surfshark, and TeraSky are going to
share stories and details of real-life dbt applications, how it helps in their daily lives, and what to expect from dbt in the future.

When & where?
The meetup will take place in Oxylabs’ office, located in Cyber City Building C, Švitrigailos str. 32, Vilnius.

📅 Date: 29th of October, 2024
👋 Doors open: 18:00
🕑 Duration: ~2 hours

Agenda

18:00-18:15 – ☕🥪Snacks & chitchat.
18:15-18:20 – Meetup moderator’s welcome word.
18:20-18:50 – Introduction to dbt Cloud – Gediminas Krištopaitis, Data Tech Lead at TeraSky.
18:50-19:20 – Building a scalable analytics architecture with dbt Core and Airflow – Laima Plėšnytė, Data Analyst at Oxylabs.
19:20-19:30 – A quick break.
19:30-20:00 – Surfshark’s Journey to Analytics Engineering – Marius Žukauskas, Analytics Engineering Team Lead at Surfshark.
20:00 – 🍕Pizza, 🥤drinks, and 🗣️conversations

About dbt meetups
dbt Meetups are data community events open to all folks working with data. Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, but you can expect presentations on broader topics like analytics engineering, data stacks, data operations, modeling, testing, and team structures.

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

About the organizers
Oxylabs is a market-leading web intelligence collection platform, driven by the highest business, ethics, and compliance standards, enabling companies worldwide to unlock data-driven insights. See open roles: career.oxylabs.io

TeraSky is a team of cloud, cybersecurity, and data engineering experts ready to help with your toughest technical challenges. Also, they’re the only official dbt partner in the Baltics. More at terasky-europe.com

🤝For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-baltics channel in dbt Community Slack (getdbt.com/community).

Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/
